title: Verify existing drizzle-orm vulnerability issue #832
description: This task reports the same drizzle-orm SQL injection vulnerability (GHSA-gpj5-g38j-94v9, CVE-2026-39356) that is already tracked in GitHub issue #832. Issue #832 covers the HIGH severity SQL injection via improperly escaped SQL identifiers in drizzle-orm <0.45.2. No new issue needed - existing issue #832 already documents this vulnerability with the correct affected version (0.44.7), patch version (>=0.45.2), and suggested fix (pnpm update drizzle-orm@>=0.45.2).
